notes.alexander: not as creamy, sweet, or strong as you would want from these ingredients
notes.amaretto-martini:
Night after night of tweaking to get this perfect for game night has produced a BANGER cocktail
Variations:
- Try Demerara simple syrup which brings in more richness and a caramel/molasses taste profile and fuller mouthfeel
notes.americano:
Sweet start, very bitter finish that has you coming back for more.
Variations:
- 3 oz of soda water which results in a very refreshing spritz like drink for the summer. 
- Adding lemon soda bring an interesting twist, but can't tell if it is better

cocktails.name: Amaretto Martini
method: Shake with ice for 20 seconds.
Strain and serve neat. Serve over fresh ice if preferred.
cocktails.userNotes:
Night after night of tweaking to get this perfect for game night has produced a BANGER cocktail
Variations:
- Try Demerara simple syrup which brings in more richness and a caramel/molasses taste profile and fuller mouthfeel

cocktails.name: Alexander
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.
Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.userNotes: not as creamy, sweet, or strong as you would want from these ingredients

cocktails.name: Americano
method: Mix the ingredients directly in an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes.
Add a splash of Soda Water. Stir gently.
cocktails.userNotes:
Sweet start, very bitter finish that has you coming back for more.
Variations:
- 3 oz of soda water which results in a very refreshing spritz like drink for the summer. 
- Adding lemon soda bring an interesting twist, but can't tell if it is better

cocktails.name: Angel Face
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.
Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Aviation
ingredients: 1/6 oz (1 Bar Spoon) Violet Floral Liqueur [Crème de Violette]
method: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Shake with cracked ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Bee’s Knees
method: Stir honey with lemon and orange juices until it dissolves, add gin and shake with ice. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Bellini
method: Pour peach puree into the mixing glass with ice, add the Prosecco wine.
Stir gently and pour in a chilled flute glass.

cocktails.name: Between the Sheets
method: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Black Russian
method: Pour the ingredients into the old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes.
Stir gently. strain ingredients into old fashioned glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: Bloody Mary
ingredients: Tabasco, Celery Salt, Pepper (Up to taste)
method: Stir gently all the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice, pour into rocks glass.

cocktails.name: Boulevardier
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Bramble
ingredients: 1/2 oz Blackberry Fruit Liqueur [Crème de Mûre]
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker except the Crème de Mûre, shake well with ice, strain into chilled old fashioned glass filled with crushed ice, then pour the blackberry liqueur (Crème de Mûre) over the top of the drink, in a circular motion.

cocktails.name: Brandy Crusta
ingredients: 1/6 oz (1 Bar Spoon) Orange Fruit Liqueur [Curacao]
method: Mix together all ingredients with ice cubes in a mixing
glass and strain into a prepared slim cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Caipirinha
method: Place lime and sugar into a double old fashioned glass and muddle gently.
Fill the glass with cracked ice and add Cachaça. Stir gently to involve ingredients.

cocktails.name: Canchanchara
method: Mix honey with water and lime juice and spread the mixture on the bottom and sides of the glass.
Add cracked ice, and then the rum.
End by energetically stirring from bottom to top.

cocktails.name: Cardinale
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well.
Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Casino
ingredients: 1 1/3 oz Old Tom Gin [Old Tom Gin]
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktails shaker, shake well with ice, strain
into chilled rocks glass with ice.

cocktails.name: Champagne Cocktail
ingredients: Few drops of Orange Fruit Liqueur [Grand Marnier] (optional)
method: Place the sugar cube with 2 dashes of bitters in a large Champagne glass, add the cognac.
Pour gently chilled Champagne.

cocktails.name: Chartreuse Swizzle
ingredients: 1 1/2 oz Green Herb and Anise Liqueur [Chartreuse]
method: Pour all ingredients into a tall glass, add pebble ice.
With the help of a swizzle stick (or cocktail spoon) mix vigorously, complete by filling the glass with more pebble ice.

cocktails.name: Clover Club
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktails shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Corpse Reviver #2
method: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice.
Shake well and strain in chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Cosmopolitan
method: Add all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake well and strain into large cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Cuba Libre
method: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: Daiquiri
method: In a cocktail shaker add all ingredients. Stir well to dissolve the sugar.
Add ice and shake. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Dark ‘n’ Stormy
method: In a highball glass filled with ice pour the ginger beer and top floating with the Rum.

cocktails.name: Don’s Special Daiquiri
method: Blend for a few seconds in a milkshake mixer with crushed ice and pour into a footed copo glass.
Fill the glass with more crushed ice.

cocktails.name: Dry Martini
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Espresso Martini
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Fernandito
method: Pour the Fernet Branca into a double old fashioned glass with ice, fill the glass up with Cola. Gently stir.

cocktails.name: French 75
method: Pour all the ingredients, except Champagne, into a shaker.
Shake well and strain into a Champagne flute.
Top up with Champagne.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: French Connection
method: Pour all ingredients directly into old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: French Martini
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Garibaldi
method: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: Gin Basil Smash
method: Add all ingredients into shaker with ice.
Shake vigorously and pour into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Gin Fizz
method: Shake all ingredients with ice except soda water.
Pour into thin tall Tumbler glass , top with a splash soda water.

cocktails.name: Grand Margarita
method: Rim the rock glass with good quality sea salt. Pour the ingredients into the shaker.
Add ice to both glass and shaker.
Shake hard for 10 seconds. Strain the drink into the glass.

cocktails.name: Grasshopper
ingredients: 2/3 oz Herb and Anise Liqueur [Crème de Menthe] (Green)
method: Pour all ingredients into shaker filled with ice.
Shake briskly for few seconds. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Hanky Panky
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well.
Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Hemingway Special
method: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake well and strain into a large cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Horse’s Neck
method: Pour Cognac and ginger ale directly into highball glass with ice cubes.
Stir gently.
If preferred, add dashes of Angostura Bitter.

cocktails.name: IBA Tiki
method: In a cocktail shaker muddle a thin slice of Gengibre, Pour all other ingredients.
Shake vigorously with ice.
Strain into a chilled Tiki glass filled with pebbled ice.

cocktails.name: Illegal
ingredients: 1/6 oz (1 Bar Spoon) Maraschino Fruit Liqueur [Luxardo]
method: Pour all ingredients into the shaker. Shake vigorously with ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass, or “on the rocks” in a traditional clay or terracotta mug.

cocktails.name: Irish Coffee
method: Warm black coffee is poured into a preheated Irish coffee glass.
Whiskey and at least one teaspoon of sugar is added and stirred until dissolved.
Fresh thick chilled cream is carefully poured over the back of a spoon held just above the surface of the coffee.
The layer of cream will float on the coffee without mixing.
Plain sugar can be replaced with sugar syrup

cocktails.name: John Collins
method: Pour all ingredients directly into highball filled with ice. Stir gently.

cocktails.name: Jungle Bird
method: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice and shake.
Strain into a rocks glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: Kir
ingredients: 1/3 oz Crème de Cassis [Blackcurrant Fruit Liqueur [Crème de Cassis]]
method: Pour Crème de Cassis into glass, top up with white wine.

cocktails.name: Last Word
ingredients: 3/4 oz Green Herb and Anise Liqueur [Chartreuse]
method: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Lemon Drop Martini
method: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Long Island Iced Tea
method: Add all ingredients into highball glass filled with ice.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: Mai Tai
method: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake and pour into a double rocks glass or an highball glass.
* The Martinique molasses rum used by Trader Vic was not an Agricole Rhum but a type of “rummy” from molasses.

cocktails.name: Manhattan
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Margarita
method: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Martinez
ingredients: 1/6 oz (1 Bar Spoon) Maraschino Fruit Liqueur [Luxardo]
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Mary Pickford
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Mimosa
method: Pour orange juice into flute glass and gently pour the sparkling wine.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: Mint Julep
method: In Julep Stainless Steel Cup gently muddle the mint with sugar and water.
Fill the glass with cracked ice, add the Bourbon and stir well until the cup frosts.

cocktails.name: Missionary’s Downfall
method: Blend all the ingredients with half cup of crushed ice.
Serve it in a Coppa grande.

cocktails.name: Mojito
method: Mix mint springs with sugar and lime juice.
Add splash of soda water and fill the glass with ice.
Pour the rum and top with soda water. Light stir to involve all ingredients.

cocktails.name: Monkey Gland
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Moscow Mule
method: In an Mule Cup or rocks glass, combine the vodka and ginger beer.
Add lime juice and gently stir to involve all ingredients.

cocktails.name: Naked and Famous
ingredients: 3/4 oz Yellow Herb and Anise Liqueur [Chartreuse]
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Negroni
method: Pour all ingredients directly into chilled old fashioned glass filled with ice.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: New York Sour
method: Pour all ingredients into the shaker. Shake vigorously with ice.
Strain into a chilled rocks glass filled with ice. Float the wine on top.

cocktails.name: Old Cuban
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker except the wine, shake well with ice, strain into chilled elegant cocktail glass.
Top up with the sparkling wine.

cocktails.name: Old Fashioned
method: Place sugar cube in old fashioned glass and saturate with bitter, add few dashes of plain water. Muddle until dissolved. Fill the glass with ice cubes and add whiskey.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: Paloma
method: Poor the tequila into a highball glass, squeeze the lime juice.
Add ice and salt, fill up pink grapefruit soda.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: Paper Plane
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Paradise
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Penicillin
method: Muddle fresh ginger in a shaker and add the remaining ingredients except for the Islay single malt whisky.
Fill the shaker with ice and shake.
Fine train into a chilled Old Fashioned glass with ice.
Float the single malt whisky on top.

cocktails.name: Piña Colada
method: Blend all the ingredients with ice in a electric blender,
pour into a large glass and serve with straws.

cocktails.name: Pisco Punch
method: Gentle mash the simple syrup with the cloves, add the remaining ingredients except the wine.
Shake vigorously and double strain into a large goblet.
Add the wine on top and gently stir.

cocktails.name: Pisco Sour
method: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled goblet glass.

cocktails.name: Planter’s Punch
method: Pour all ingredients directly in a small tumbler or a typical terracotta glass.

cocktails.name: Porn Star Martini
ingredients: 2/3 oz Passion Fruit Liqueur [Passion Fruit Liqueur]
1 2/3 oz Champagne to serve on the side
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, double strain into a large chilled cocktail glass.
Accompany with a shot of champagne.

cocktails.name: Porto Flip
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Rabo de Galo
method: Combine all the ingredients into a rocks glass, add ice and stir briefly.

cocktails.name: Ramos Fizz
method: Pour all ingredients except soda water in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake for two minutes, double strain in a glass, pour the drink back in the shaker and hard shake without ice for one minute.
Strain into a highball glass, top up with soda.

cocktails.name: Remember the Maine
ingredients: 1/2 oz Cherry Fruit Liqueur [Luxardo Cherry Brandy]
method: Pour the absinthe into a coupe glass and swirl to completely coat the inside.
Discard the absinthe and set the glass aside. Add the other ingredients to a mixing glass and fill it 3/4 full with ice. Stir until chilled, then strain into the glass rinsed with the absinthe.

cocktails.name: Russian Spring Punch
ingredients: 1/2 oz Creme de Cassis [Blackcurrant Fruit Liqueur [Crème de Cassis]]
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker except the sparkling wine, shake well with ice, strain into chilled tall tumbler glass filled with ice
and top up with sparkling wine.

cocktails.name: Rusty Nail
method: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: Sazerac
method: Rinse a chilled old-fashioned glass with the absinthe, add crushed ice and set it aside. Stir the remaining ingredients over ice in a mixing glass.
Discard the ice and any excess absinthe from the prepared glass, strain the mixed drink into the glass.

cocktails.name: Sea Breeze
method: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: Sex on the Beach
method: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: Sherry Cobbler
method: Combine sherry, sugar and 2 quarter wheels each of orange and lemon in a shaker with ice, shake briskly, strain into a Julep cocktail cup filled with crushed ice.

cocktails.name: Sidecar
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Singapore Sling
ingredients: 1/2 oz Cherry Fruit Liqueur [Cherry Sangue Morlacco]
1/4 oz DOM Bénédictine [Herb and Anise Liqueur [Bénédictine]]
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.
Shake well.
Strain into Hurricane glass.

cocktails.name: South Side
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, double-strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Spicy Fifty
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, double-strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Spritz
method: Build all ingredients into a wine glass filled with ice.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: Stinger
ingredients: 2/3 oz White Herb and Anise Liqueur [Crème de Menthe]
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well.
Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Suffering Bastard
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker except the ginger beer, shake well with ice.
Pour unstrained into a Collins glass or in the original.
S. Bastard mug and top up with ginger beer.

cocktails.name: Tequila Sunrise
method: Pour tequila and orange juice directly into highball glass filled with ice cubes.
Add the grenadine syrup to create chromatic effect (sunrise), do not stir.

cocktails.name: Three Dots and a Dash
ingredients: 1/4 oz Allspice Saint Elizabeth15 ml Fresh Lime Juice
method: Pour all ingredients in a Blender with 12 ounces of crushed ice, flash blend, pour the drink into a footed copo glass.
Fill the glass with more crushed ice.

cocktails.name: Tipperary
ingredients: 1/2 oz Green Herb and Anise Liqueur [Chartreuse]
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well. Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Tommy’s Margarita
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled rocks glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: Trinidad Sour
method: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice.
Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Tuxedo
ingredients: 1 oz Old Tom Gin [Old Tom Gin]
1/12 oz (1/2 Bar Spoons) Maraschino Fruit Liqueur [Luxardo]
1/12 oz (1/4 Bar Spoons) of Anise Liqueur [Absinthe]
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well.
Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Ve.n.to
ingredients: 1/2 oz Honey mix (replace water with chamomile)*
method: Pour all ingredients into the shaker. Shake vigorously with ice.
Strain into a chilled small tumbler glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: Vesper
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.
Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Vieux Carré
ingredients: 1/6 oz (1 Bar Spoon) Bénédictine [Herb and Anise Liqueur [Bénédictine]]
method: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well. Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Whiskey Sour
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well.
Strain into cobbler glass. If served “On the rocks”, strain ingredients
into old fashioned glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: White Lady
method: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Zombie
method: Add all ingredients into an electric blender with 6 oz of cracked ice.
With pulse bottom blend for a few seconds. Serve in a tall tumbler glass.

cocktails.name: B-52
method: Layer coffee liqueur, Irish cream, and orange liqueur in a shot glass.

cocktails.name: Bacardi
method: Shake the ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Barracuda
method: Shake rum, Galliano, pineapple, and lime with ice, strain into the glass, then top with Prosecco.

cocktails.name: Derby
method: Shake gin and bitters with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass, and finish with mint.

cocktails.name: Dirty Martini
method: Stir or shake the ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled martini glass.

cocktails.name: Godfather
method: Build over ice in an old fashioned glass and stir briefly.

cocktails.name: Godmother
method: Build over ice in an old fashioned glass and stir briefly.

cocktails.name: Golden Dream
method: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Harvey Wallbanger
method: Build vodka and orange juice over ice, then float Galliano on top.

cocktails.name: Kamikaze
method: Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Orgasm
method: Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Rose
method: Stir the ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Screwdriver
method: Build over ice in a highball glass and stir.

cocktails.name: Vampiro
method: Shake with ice and strain into an old fashioned glass over ice.

cocktails.name: Yellow Bird
method: Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
